scope: U.S. Anheuser-Busch facilities footprint referenced by the flagship AB InBev microsite.
summary: Anheuser-Busch states that it maintains 100 facilities across the country, which aligns with the flagship AB InBev network framing already used in the microsite.

scope: Coca-Cola Consolidated's disclosed operating footprint used as the conservative 70-site lower bound for the flagship Coca-Cola system scenario.
summary: Coca-Cola Consolidated disclosed 60 distribution centers and 10 manufacturing plants in its 2025 10-K. The corporate About Us page confirms the operating geography and scale, giving the flagship Coca-Cola system model an official 70-site lower bound before any additional bottler sites are layered in.

scope: Danone North America production locations listed on the official company overview page.
summary: Danone North America states that it operates 13 production locations, replacing the earlier 15-plus placeholder in the Dannon flagship microsite.

scope: Frito-Lay North America's manufacturing plus distribution footprint used as the conservative lower bound for the flagship network scenario.
summary: Frito-Lay's official supply chain manufacturing newsroom page exposes the company facts sheet used for the 30-plus manufacturing facilities and 200-plus distribution centers baseline. That supports a conservative 230-plus site lower bound for the flagship network model.

sources.label: Frito-Lay supply chain manufacturing newsroom page

scope: General Mills' owned-plant footprint used as the conservative lower bound for the flagship General Mills scenario.
summary: General Mills routes its 2025 Global Responsibility Report from the official How We Make It page. That report sets the operating baseline at 41 owned plants around the world, replacing the earlier third-party 50-plus placeholder with an official lower bound.

sources.label: General Mills How We Make It
